children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subpart $1,650,000,000 for fiscal year 2017 and $1,600,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2018 through 2020.

children.heading: Forward funding
children.label: b Forward funding
children.text: shall apply to this subpart.Section 1223 of this title
